QF.id: III-C Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices_25

question.text: Under the PFUTP Regulations, illegal mobilization of funds by carrying on any collective investment scheme is classified under which category?

answer.text: Manipulative, fraudulent and unfair trade practice

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Regulation 4(2)(q), illegal mobilization of funds by sponsoring or carrying on any collective investment scheme is listed as a manipulative, fraudulent and unfair trade practice. **The Trap:** While it also violates collective investment scheme regulations, under PFUTP it is specifically classified as a fraudulent practice. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This provision helps SEBI take action against unauthorized schemes that may fall outside the scope of specific regulations.
